'''ralada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oogenesis|oogenesis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-l-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oogenesis|oogenesis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ralada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rælædæth|rælædæth]] || [[word:rælædæj|rælædæj]] || [[word:rælædæsh|rælædæsh]] || [[word:rælædæ|rælædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ralaladath|ralaladath]] || [[word:ralaladaj|ralaladaj]] || [[word:ralaladash|ralaladash]] || [[word:ralalada|ralalada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:raladath|raladath]] || [[word:raladaj|raladaj]] || [[word:raladash|raladash]] || [[word:ralada|ralada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ralafdath|ralafdath]] || [[word:ralafdaj|ralafdaj]] || [[word:ralafdash|ralafdash]] || [[word:ralafdaf|ralafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:raladatha|raladatha]] || [[word:raladaja|raladaja]] || [[word:raladasha|raladasha]] || [[word:raladaka|raladaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:raladath|raladath]] || [[word:raladaj|raladaj]] || [[word:raladash|raladash]] || [[word:ralada|ralada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:raladathal|raladathal]] || [[word:raladajal|raladajal]] || [[word:raladashal|raladashal]] || [[word:raladakal|raladakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:raladathatha|raladathatha]] || [[word:raladajaja|raladajaja]] || [[word:raladashasha|raladashasha]] || [[word:raladaka|raladaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:raladathan|raladathan]] || [[word:raladajan|raladajan]] || [[word:raladashan|raladashan]] || [[word:raladakan|raladakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:raladathaoro|raladathaoro]] || [[word:raladajaoro|raladajaoro]] || [[word:raladashaoro|raladashaoro]] || [[word:raladakaoro|raladakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
